title: Synchronisation battle Why was Shinji paired with Asuka
display_title: Synchronisation battle Why was Shinji paired with Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Jan 21, 2018 2:26 pm During the fight against Israfel, Shinji and Asuka were forced to work together to defeat it, but had to practice synchronizing before defeating it. So why is it that Hideaki Anno decided to have them paired together for something like this? These two obviously had a rough start, which was made apparently more so towards the end of the series. And we all know that Asuka refuses to work with anybody, especially someone below her standards. I mean, they could have had Shinji paired with Rei (seeing as these two get along fairly better). And as Misato once put it, (especially in the manga chapter) they could easily pair Rei with Shinji "without a second thought".

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Jan 21, 2018 3:20 pm Because she'd had more training than Rei; and because learning cooperation is always a valuable skill that perhaps she'd not had the chance to develop. Also perhaps to give her another opportunity to prove herself.

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 21, 2018 6:37 pm Misato was completely bluffing when she said she could pair Rei with Shinji. There's a reason Rei wasn't with the two of them in their initial engagement with Israfel; Unit-00 was still damaged from Operation: Yashima, and doesn't return to active status until Matarael's attack. Misato, having known Asuka for so long, was manipulating her pride.

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sun Jan 21, 2018 7:52 pm Sachi wrote: Misato was completely bluffing when she said she could pair Rei with Shinji.

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by Cybermat47 » Sun Jan 21, 2018 10:09 pm C.T.1290 wrote: Manipulating it how?

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jan 22, 2018 1:27 am i haven't watched the series in a long time ( coming up on my bi-annual watch ) but isn't Unit 00 still being repaired/getting a spiffy new paint job at that point? I remember that aside from Operation Yashima, Unit 00 was out of commission a good deal in the first third of the series.

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Tue Jan 23, 2018 10:20 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: i haven't watched the series in a long time ( coming up on my bi-annual watch ) but isn't Unit 00 still being repaired/getting a spiffy new paint job at that point? I remember that aside from Operation Yashima, Unit 00 was out of commission a good deal in the first third of the series.

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by Epilogue » Tue Jan 30, 2018 6:10 pm ...Misato shipping Asuka and Shinji confirmed...?

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Tue Jan 30, 2018 8:28 pm Epilogue wrote: ...Misato shipping Asuka and Shinji confirmed...?

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jan 31, 2018 1:49 am Epilogue wrote: ...Misato shipping Asuka and Shinji confirmed...?

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Wed Jan 31, 2018 9:11 am ∆ Never made the connection!

[]: Re: Synchronisation battle: Why was Shinji paired with Asuka?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Wed Jan 31, 2018 5:43 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Remember who actually suggested the plan. It was Kaji, trying to point Asuka at some other male.
